sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, data String, nullable_data Nullable(String));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'name:Jack, age:25;', NULL), (2, 'product:book;price:20', 'optional_value');
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs(data) AS kv_pairs FROM test_table WHERE nullable_data IS NULL;
SELECT id, extractKeyValuePairs(data, ':', ';', '\'') AS kv_pairs FROM test_table WHERE extractKeyValuePairs(data) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, count() AS value_count FROM (SELECT extractKeyValuePairs(data) AS kv FROM test_table) GROUP BY kv HAVING kv IS NULL;
SELECT id, toString(nullable_data) AS str_nullable_data, extractKeyValuePairs(str_nullable_data) AS kv FROM test_table WHERE str_nullable_data IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_pairs (key_value String, another Nullable(String));
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs(key_value) AS key_value_pairs, another IS NULL AS is_another_null FROM test_pairs;

SELECT id, extractKeyValuePairs(data) AS kv_pairs FROM (SELECT data FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT max(id) FROM test_table WHERE nullable_data IS NOT NULL) AND nullable_data IS NOT NULL) AS subquery ORDER BY id;
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs(data, '=', ',') AS kv FROM test_table GROUP BY kv HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 AND kv IS NOT NULL;
